page_metadata.biotools__summary: Predict consensus secondary structures for unaligned sequences. Uses a blocked Gibbs sampling algorithm that iteratively samples from the conditional probability distributions P(Structure | Alignment) and P(Alignment | Structure).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Predict consensus secondary structures for unaligned sequences. Uses a blocked Gibbs sampling algorithm that iteratively samples from the conditional probability distributions P(Structure | Alignment) and P(Alignment | Structure).
